attacking_style: Rarely initiates explosive attacks; prefers controlled tempo riding and exploiting time trials. When attacking, targets final 800m of summit finishes or descents where power sustainability advantage applies.
team_tactics: Often races isolated without deep domestique support. Team attempts early pace control but he frequently finishes climbs alone, relying on individual diesel engine and pacing judgment rather than lead-out trains.
terrain_preference: Dominates long time trials (especially 30-40km) and moderate sustained climbs. Struggles on steep explosive gradients (Zoncolan-type), technical descents, and when gradients ease requiring sustained threshold power rather than peak watts.
vulnerability: Inferior descending skills repeatedly exploited by rivals; loses time when caught out of position. Cannot sustain back-to-back peak efforts. Cracks under repeated maximal accelerations (3+ attacks within final 10km). Cornering crashes appear chronic.
key_patterns: Grand Tour ITT specialist: won by 0.001s and 31s margins, overturning 53s deficit (3 observations)
Dropped by explosive accelerations but limits losses via descending and pacing judgment (5 observations)
Rivals target him on technical descents when out of position, exposing chronic weakness (4 observations)
Racing without power data/instinct improved performance; suggests over-reliance on telemetry (2 observations)
Post-2020 form deterioration: dropped early, abandoned races, cannot sustain consecutive efforts (6 observations)
Tests form aggressively in non-GC roles for reconnaissance despite deficits (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 observations show repeated early drops, mid-race abandonment, inability to sustain efforts day-after-day despite brief TT resurgence. Extended absence and injury struggles evident.
